headline: UK Budget 2025: Tell us what you think
summary: Post a comment to share your view and debate with other FT subscribers
body_text:
The chancellor has set out the Budget. Share your reaction to it in the comments below.

Tell us how the measures will affect your household, your finances or your business. What do you think they mean for the wider economy, public services and the country’s long-term outlook?

Do you have a question you want to put to our FT Budget experts? Take part in our live Q&A tomorrow, Thursday, November 27, at 1pm (GMT). Submit your question now.
